query:
UPDATE users u
INNER JOIN coach_profiles cp ON u.id = cp.userId
SET u.stripeConnectAccountId = CONCAT('acct_test_coach_', u.id),
    u.stripeConnectOnboarded = true
WHERE cp.id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM coach_profiles LIMIT 3) AS tmp);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user o7gqiRJAqhDK5GQ.9c38f5a63e4d --database Xkyng35xnYFybYAdmyVo96 --execute UPDATE users u
INNER JOIN coach_profiles cp ON u.id = cp.userId
SET u.stripeConnectAccountId = CONCAT('acct_test_coach_', u.id),
    u.stripeConnectOnboarded = true
WHERE cp.id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM coach_profiles LIMIT 3) AS tmp);
